description: Typo in column name: quantty -> quantity
fixed_query:
SELECT
  order_line_id,
  order_id,
  quantity,
  unit_price
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
WHERE quantity > 1
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  order_line_id,
  order_id,
  quantty,
  unit_price
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
WHERE quantity > 1
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: column "quantty" does not exist
  Hint: Perhaps you meant to reference the column "olf.quantity".
  Position: 157

description: Wrong model id in model reference
fixed_query: SELECT refund_id, order_id, refund_created_at FROM {{#135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf LIMIT 5
broken_query: SELECT refund_id, order_id, refund_created_at FROM {{#1135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf LIMIT 5
error_message: Card 1135 does not exist, or is from a different Database.

description: Missing FROM keyword with model reference
fixed_query: SELECT refund_id, order_id, refund_created_at FROM {{#135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf LIMIT 5
broken_query: SELECT refund_id, order_id, refund_created_at {{#135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf LIMIT 5

description: Missing WHERE keyword with model reference
fixed_query:
SELECT
  quantity,
  unit_price
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
WHERE unit_price > 10
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  quantity,
  unit_price
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
unit_price > 10

description: Missing closing parenthesis in SUM with model
fixed_query:
SELECT
  product_id,
  SUM(quantity) AS total_qty
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
GROUP BY product_id
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  product_id,
  SUM(quantity AS total_qty
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
GROUP BY product_id
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "AS"
  Position: 155

fixed_query:
SELECT
  product_id,
  SUM(quantity) AS total_qty
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
GROUP BY product_id
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  product_id,
  SUM(quantity) AS total_qty
FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: column "olf.product_id" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
  Position: 128

description: Wrong alias reference in WHERE clause with model
fixed_query:
SELECT
  rf.refund_id,
  rf.order_id,
  rf.refund_created_at
FROM {{#135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf
WHERE rf.order_id IS NOT NULL
broken_query:
SELECT
  rf.refund_id,
  rf.order_id,
  rf.refund_created_at
FROM {{#135-shopify-refund-facts}} AS rf
WHERE r.order_id IS NOT NULL
error_message:
ERROR: missing FROM-clause entry for table "r"
  Position: 1634

description: Missing AS keyword in CTE with model
fixed_query:
WITH order_totals AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    SUM(quantity) AS total_qty
  FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
  GROUP BY order_id
)
SELECT * FROM order_totals
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
WITH order_totals (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    SUM(quantity) AS total_qty
  FROM {{#125-shopify-order-line-facts}} AS olf
  GROUP BY order_id
)
SELECT * FROM order_totals
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
  Position: 141
